basicDetails.implementingAgency: Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Family Pension” is implemented by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, on the death of a pensioner worker who is being given pension by the Haryana Building &amp; Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, half of his/her pension is given to his/her spouse (as the case may be).
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. After the death of the worker-pensioner, half of the pension amount will be given to the dependent wife/husband as family pension every month.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, on the death of a pensioner worker who is being given pension by the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, half of his/her pension is given to his/her spouse (as the case may be).

children.text: The scheme “Family Pension” is implemented by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, on the death of a pensioner worker who is being given pension by the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, half of his/her pension is given to his/her spouse (as the case may be).
After the death of the worker-pensioner, half of the pension amount will be given to the dependent wife/husband as family pension every month.
Apply for Scheme: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
Step 01:
To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant needs to visit the Official Portal -
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
Step 02:
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, then he/she gets registered on the portal.
Step 03:
For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Step 04:
Applicants will receive the login ID on their mobile number.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
Step 01:
Visit the Official Portal -
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
Step 02:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Applicant needs to fill in their credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
Step 03:
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list” and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Step 04:
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Step 05:
Fill in all the details asked in the online application form and submit the application form.
HBOCW Registration User Manual

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Apply for Scheme: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:**
**Step 01:** To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant needs to visit the Official Portal -[Antyodaya-SARAL Portal](https://saralharyana.gov.in/)
**Step 02:** If the applicant is not registered on the portal, then he/she gets registered on the portal. 
**Step 03:** For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number &amp; password. Click on ‘Submit’.
**Step 04:** Applicants will receive the login ID on their mobile number.
> **Login to Apply for the Scheme:**

**Step 01:** Visit the Official Portal -[Antyodaya-SARAL Portal](https://saralharyana.gov.in/)
**Step 02:** The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Applicant needs to fill in their credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
**Step 03:** In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list” and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
**Step 04:** Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
**Step 05:** Fill in all the details asked in the online application form and submit the application form.
[HBOCW Registration User Manual](https://hrylabour.gov.in/uploads/manuals/Manual_for_Worker_Registration_HBOCW.pdf)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be the spouse of the deceased worker.
   1. The deceased worker should have been registered with the Haryana Building &amp; Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
   1. The registered deceased worker must have been getting the pension from the Board.

children.text: The applicant should be the spouse of the deceased worker.
The deceased worker should have been registered with the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The registered deceased worker must have been getting the pension from the Board.
